content.en:
The Holy Sands was firmly fixed in the Void of this Treasure Land, and the nearby Supreme Domain Ancestor wanted to take it into the inner world, but the speed was very slow.

Rumble!

Another powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor attacked him, inflicting heavy damage on him in an instant.

The fight has begun!

And Ye Tian also made a move, he bombarded everything, and killed a famous and powerful domain ancestor.

After the fall of one of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors were frightened and retreated one by one, not daring to fight.

At this time, only Ye Tian, Wu Xiu, Dark Red and some other Supreme Domain Ancestors were left here, the strength of these Supreme Domain Ancestors was not weak at all, and they were all the top ten demon geniuses on the Supreme Strength List of the Major Holy Gates, all of them had combat power comparable to that of a seven-step invincible domain ancestor, but some were a little weaker, and some were infinitely close to the combat power of a six-step invincible domain ancestor.

And these people's qi locked on Ye Tian, as if they would attack Ye Tian at the same time.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor!"

Wu Xiu and the others stopped Ye Tian and didn't let Ye Tian go to snatch the Holy Sands.

"If you don't go to snatch the Holy Sands, but stop me, aren't you afraid that others will take the opportunity to snatch the Holy Sands?"

Ye Tian sneered.

The Dark Red Domain Ancestor said: "The Holy Sands are firmly connected to the Void, and it will take a little time to take the Saint Sands, so naturally I am not afraid of being snatched away by others." Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, your strength is comparable to the combat power of the Six-Step Invincible Domain Ancestors, if we don't join forces to deal with you, we, the Supreme Domain Ancestors, will not have the slightest chance to snatch the Holy Sands. "

Wu Xiu also said: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, now I give you two choices, retreat immediately, and make an oath not to snatch the Holy Sands, otherwise we will join forces to kill you!"

For the sake of Saint Jinsha, it is worth taking the risk to kill Ye Tian.

"The same thing I warn you, retreat immediately, or I will kill you immediately!"

Ye Tian counter-threatened.

"Do it!"

Wu Xiu and others made a move.

They didn't dare to waste time, after all, if they didn't waste a second, maybe there would be a more powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor here, once they delayed for a long time, even if they killed Ye Tian, their chances of snatching the Holy Golden Sands would be much reduced.

They are not real allies, they are still competitors to each other, but Ye Tian is too threatening, so they have to unite.

Therefore, killing Ye Tian and then competing with each other for the Holy Sands is the best choice, and time cannot be delayed.

Nearly ten of the top ten powerhouses on the Supreme Power List shot together, and this kind of deterrent power was enough to threaten the six-step invincible domain ancestor.

Among these Supreme Domain Ancestors, there are soul holy skills, binding holy skills, and weird holy skills, but more are attack holy skills.

Moreover, they all used holy relics and holy soldiers, and under the outbreak in unison, the six-step invincible domain ancestor would also be severely damaged.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor!"

The Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate were nervous and worried.

However, they did not dare to step forward, because their strength was too weak, and if they intervened, they were afraid that they would not be able to help at all, but would drag their feet.

Now, they can only hope that Ye Tian's strength is strong enough, or wait for the top ten of the battle gate's supreme list to come to support.

But Ye Tian didn't panic at all.

"I originally wanted to keep a low profile, but you are looking for death, so let you see my real strength!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Zu Jia!"

Rumble!!!!!

The Ancestral Technique Ancestral Armor protected Ye Tian, and no matter how many attacks he attacked, he couldn't shake Ye Tian's defense.

Then, with a wave of Ye Tian's hand, countless golden rays turned into silk threads and killed these Supreme Domain Ancestors.

A supreme domain ancestor comparable to the weaker seven-step invincible domain ancestor was a supreme domain ancestor ranked ninth in the Dark Holy Gate, but as a result, he was cut by Ye Tian's golden silk ancestor technique, and his body immediately disintegrated.

In an instant, this Supreme Domain Ancestor fell!

It can be said that the strength that Ye Tian is now showing is no longer the six-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, but the five-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, and it is not a weak five-step invincible domain ancestor, but a decent five-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, close to medium.

It is very easy for a five-step invincible domain ancestor to kill a seven-step invincible domain ancestor, and besides, the strongest domain ancestor is easier to kill than an invincible domain ancestor.

Therefore, this supreme domain ancestor was killed by Ye Tian in seconds without the power to resist.

"No !!!"

One by one, the Supreme Domain Ancestor was terrified, but his life-saving ability was slightly poor, and he might have blocked a blow, but the golden mangs of the Golden Silk Ancestor Technique were cut again and again, and there was no way to resist at all.

Soon, a Famous Powerful Domain Ancestor fell.

"Impossible, how can you know the ancestral technique, and it is two ancestral skills!!!"

Wu Xiu couldn't believe it.

Among the Invincible Domain Ancestors, such as the top Invincible Domain Ancestors within the major Holy Gates, I am afraid that few people have realized the ancestral skills.

For example, the Thirty-six War Emperors of the Battle Gate, only the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors are known to have comprehended the ancestral skills.

And Ye Tiancai Supreme Domain Ancestor, the cultivation time is also very short, he is an extremely young Supreme Domain Ancestor, such a young Supreme Domain Ancestor has actually comprehended the ancestral technique, is this possible?

If someone had told him before that the Supreme Domain Ancestor could practice the Ancestral Technique, he would have regarded the other party as a madman and a fool.

But now, he saw Ye Tianshi display his ancestral skills with his own eyes, and they were two ancestral skills, and his strength was comparable to the five-step invincible domain ancestor combat power.

This is not a demon, this is a taboo-like existence!

"Run!"

Wu Xiu is ready to escape, and the Dark Red Domain Ancestor is also ready to escape, otherwise he will definitely die.

They did whatever it took to even burn the Domain Body and the Holy Soul just to escape.

However, the golden silk thread transformed by the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique came through the void.

Burst!

Wu Xiu's body was directly penetrated, and the so-called defense was of no use at all.

A life-saving thing was blessed on his body, and even an ancestral medicine to restore his injuries was used, but there was no way to repair his injuries.

Soon, the golden silk thread came through again.

Under the attack again and again, Wu Xiu still let out an unwilling sound of despair, and his huge body turned into a corpse, suspended in the void.

Wu Xiu, it's fallen!

At this time, only the Dark Red Domain Ancestor was left, but Ye Tian had already blocked the void, although with the power of the Five Elements Blockade, there was no way to completely block a strong person like the Dark Red Domain Ancestor, but it could block the other party, and it would take time for her to completely break the blockade.

And Ye Tian would not give him time.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, let me go, I'm willing to pay the price!"

The Dark Red Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

"No, you don't!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

If these domain ancestors dare to make a move against him, then they must have plans to fall.

"Then let's die together!"

The Dark Red Domain Ancestor went crazy.

She took out a treasure, and a terrifying force was about to erupt.
